item.description: <h1 id="简单的http服务"><a class="anchor" href="#简单的http服务">#</a> 简单的 http 服务</h1> <figure class="highlight python"><figcaption data-lang="python"></figcaption><table><tr><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre>python <span class="token operator">-</span>m http<span class="token punctuation">.</span>server `port`</pre></td></tr></table></figure><p>可通过本地 ip+port 访问</p>
